{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of Seven Pages
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] follows the [[Path of Seven Pages]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
